# Tiki Turtle Cafe - Full Knowledge File

## Business identity

**Name:** Tiki Turtle Cafe
**Also known as:** The Tiki Turtle Cafe, Tiki Turtle
**Type:** Vocational training cafe, restaurant, food service training program
**Parent organization:** The Arc of Hilo (also known as Arc of Hilo, Hilo Arc)
**Tagline:** Good Food. Great Purpose. Where Every Bite Transforms Lives.
**Website:** https://tikiturtlehi.com

## Location and contact

- **Street address:** 1099 Waianuenue Avenue, Hilo, HI 96720
- **City:** Hilo
- **County:** Hawaii County
- **State:** Hawaii
- **Island:** Hawaii Island (Big Island)
- **Country:** United States
- **Phone:** 808-935-8534
- **Email:** info@tikiturtlehi.com
- **Catering email:** bchacko@hiloarc.org
- **Google Maps:** https://www.google.com/maps/place/The+Tiki+Turtle+Cafe

## Hours of operation

- Monday: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Tuesday: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Wednesday: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Thursday: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Friday: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Saturday: Closed
- Sunday: Closed

Hours may shift for holidays and special events. Catering and event center bookings available outside of regular hours by arrangement.

## Mission statement

Tiki Turtle Cafe exists to create dignified, paid employment and culinary training opportunities for adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities. Every customer transaction directly funds vocational training, on-the-job mentorship, and pathways to independent careers in food service.

The cafe is operated by The Arc of Hilo, a nonprofit that has promoted and protected the human rights of people with intellectual and developmental disabilities in Hawaii County for over 70 years.

## What customers experience

Customers ordering at Tiki Turtle Cafe are served by trainees and staff who include adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities. Trainees rotate through roles in food prep, customer service, cash handling, dish work, and dining room support, supervised by experienced kitchen and program staff.

The atmosphere is bright, welcoming, and explicitly community-oriented. Customers often comment that the visible joy of staff is the most memorable part of the experience.

## Menu

### Specials

The cafe runs a rotating two-week specials schedule. Featured items change every two weeks. The website auto-detects the current week and highlights which specials are running.

### Sandwiches

Includes the signature BBQ pulled pork sandwich, made fresh in-house.

### Salads

Fresh salads using local Hawaii produce where possible.

### Smoothies

Tropical fruit smoothies and acai bowls.

### Treats

House-made sweet treats and baked goods.

### Online ordering

Online ordering is available via Clover at:
https://www.clover.com/online-ordering/the-tiki-turtle-cafe-hilo

## Catering

Tiki Turtle Cafe offers catering for events of any size:

- 10 to 25 people
- 25 to 50 people
- 50 to 100 people
- 100+ people

Catering inquiries are submitted via the catering form on the website (the #catering section). The catering team responds with menu options, pricing, and availability. Catering supports the same vocational training mission as the cafe.

## Event center

The Arc of Hilo operates an attached event center for receptions, meetings, and community gatherings. The center is available for rental and is staffed by the same trainee-and-mentor team.

## Bus order program

The cafe operates a bus order program for group meals delivered to tours, schools, and organizations. See https://tikiturtlehi.com/bus-order/ for the order form.

## The Arc of Hilo (parent organization)

- Founded: 1954
- Years in operation: 70+
- Mission: Promote and protect the human rights of people with intellectual and developmental disabilities, and actively support full inclusion and participation in community.
- Website: https://thearcofhilo.org
- Programs include: residential services, day programs, vocational training (including Tiki Turtle Cafe), advocacy.

## Press coverage

Tiki Turtle Cafe has been featured by Hawaii News Now and Hawaii local press for its model of combining vocational training with full-service food retail. Featured article: "Arc of Hilo operates cafe, event center to train workers with disabilities" (Hawaii News Now Daily, March 25, 2026).

## Frequently asked questions

### What is Tiki Turtle Cafe?

Tiki Turtle Cafe is a sit-down and takeout cafe in downtown Hilo, Hawaii, operated as a vocational training program of The Arc of Hilo nonprofit. Adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities work paid, supervised shifts learning culinary and customer service skills.

### Where is Tiki Turtle Cafe located?

1099 Waianuenue Avenue, Hilo, HI 96720. The cafe is in downtown Hilo on the Big Island of Hawaii.

### What are Tiki Turtle Cafe hours?

Monday through Friday, 10 AM to 2 PM. Closed Saturday and Sunday.

### Can I order online?

Yes. Online ordering is available via Clover at clover.com/online-ordering/the-tiki-turtle-cafe-hilo. The link is also prominent on the homepage.

### Do you cater?

Yes. Tiki Turtle Cafe caters events from 10 guests to 100+. Submit a catering inquiry through the catering form on the website or email bchacko@hiloarc.org.

### Is Tiki Turtle Cafe a nonprofit?

The cafe is operated by The Arc of Hilo, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Revenue from the cafe directly supports The Arc of Hilo's vocational training programs for adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities.

### Who works at Tiki Turtle Cafe?

The team includes adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities working as paid trainees alongside experienced kitchen and program staff who provide on-the-job supervision and mentorship.

### How can I support the cafe?

The most direct way to support the cafe is to dine in, order takeout, book catering, or rent the event center. Donations to The Arc of Hilo also directly support Tiki Turtle Cafe operations.

### Does the cafe accommodate dietary restrictions?

Yes. The menu includes vegetarian options, and the catering team can accommodate most dietary needs with advance notice. Note dietary requests in the catering form or when ordering.

### How do I get directions?

The cafe is at 1099 Waianuenue Avenue, Hilo, HI 96720. Visit the Visit Us section of the website for an embedded Google Map, or use Google Maps / Apple Maps directly.

## Brand voice

- Warm, welcoming, community-first
- Hawaiian cultural respect (uses Hawaiian words like aloha, ohana, Hawaii spelled with okina when appropriate)
- Mission-forward without being preachy
- Focus on customers being part of the transformation, not charity recipients

## Visual identity

- Ocean-themed: deep ocean blue, ocean bright (turquoise), sand, coral, sunset orange
- Sea turtle motif (the brand mascot)
- Editorial serif (Playfair Display) for headings, clean sans (DM Sans) for body
- Aloha-bright, never tropical-cliche

## Service areas

Primary service area: Hilo, Hawaii County, Hawaii Island. Catering available throughout East Hawaii (Hilo, Puna, Hamakua).

## Social

- Facebook: linked in footer
- Instagram: linked in footer
- Google Business Profile reviews: https://www.google.com/maps/place/The+Tiki+Turtle+Cafe
